title: Simulation (Phantom) Laboratory

Simulation (Phantom) Laboratory

About

Fakülte

It has been prepared to enable our students to receive a contemporary preclinical education. Students will practice all treatments of dentistry on a mannequin mounted on a dental unit, which is an exact replica of a dental unit, within the framework of certain scenarios and trainings. Thanks to the technological camera and sound systems on the instructor's desk in our simulation laboratory, our students can watch their instructors' practical applications and teachings simultaneously or record an educational video on their personal LCD monitors in their phantom units.

Thus, our students will be able to move on to clinical training with the knowledge and skills to treat patients in kinetics.
